content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Stack Sorting". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/911/problem/E
constraints: All elements in the stack are distinct.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of elements in the stack. The next line contains n space-separated integers representing the elements in the stack.
content.outputFormat: The sorted stack elements in ascending order, one per line, or a message indicating that it's impossible to sort the stack.

solution.approach: Use a temporary stack to store the sorted elements. Iterate through the input stack, popping elements and pushing them onto the temporary stack in sorted order. If an element is smaller than the top element of the temporary stack, pop elements from the temporary stack and push them back onto the input stack until the top element of the temporary stack is smaller than the current element.
